_comment: Negative fixture for PRD-105-R3 — a manifest declaring delivery: "static" but populating `auth.schemes`, a runtime-only field. PRD-600 MUST flag this as inconsistent: a static-profile manifest serves files anonymously over HTTP; auth scheme negotiation belongs to PRD-106.

_expected_validator_finding.missing: manifest declares delivery: "static" but populates `auth.schemes`; auth schemes are runtime-only fields and MUST NOT appear in a static-profile manifest
